DomainEvent.description: Canonical domain event envelope. Immutable operational fact emitted by any bounded context.

DomainEventEnvelope.description: Zod schema and inferred type for the canonical domain event envelope.

EventCatalog.description: Central registry for all domain event types with schema validation.

DomainError.description: Standard domain error with code, correlationId, retryable flag, and safe JSON serialization.

CanonicalError.description: Canonical API error response shape returned by all endpoints.

TraceContext.description: W3C Trace Context propagated across service and queue boundaries.

LogEntry.description: Structured JSON log entry shape with redaction rules.

OutboxEntry.description: Transactional outbox table row shape for durable event emission.

JobPayload.description: Canonical job payload shape enforced by all BullMQ workers.

QueueNames.description: Domain-scoped queue and DLQ naming convention.

Database.description: Minimal Supabase Database type stub for generic client usage.

UserResponse.description: API response DTO for user data.

UpdateProfileRequest.description: API request DTO for updating a user profile.

ProfileResponse.description: API response DTO for profile data.

RegisterSellerRequest.description: API request DTO for registering a seller.

CompleteOnboardingStepRequest.description: API request DTO for completing a seller onboarding step.

SellerProfileResponse.description: API response DTO for seller profile data.

UserCreatedEvent.description: Domain event emitted when a user is created.

UserSuspendedEvent.description: Domain event emitted when a user is suspended.

UserReactivatedEvent.description: Domain event emitted when a user is reactivated.

SellerOnboardingStepCompletedEvent.description: Domain event emitted when a seller completes an onboarding step.

SellerActivatedEvent.description: Domain event emitted when a seller is activated.

SellerSuspendedEvent.description: Domain event emitted when a seller is suspended.

SellerReactivatedEvent.description: Domain event emitted when a seller is reactivated.

UserStatus.description: User lifecycle status enum: active | suspended | deactivated.

SellerStatus.description: Seller lifecycle status enum: draft | pending_review | active | suspended.

OnboardingStep.description: Seller onboarding step enum: identity | banking | tax | terms.

AuthContext.description: Canonical authenticated request shape used across the platform.

UserRole.description: User role enum: user | seller | admin.

VerifiedToken.description: Decoded JWT token shape abstracted from auth provider specifics.

AuthUser.description: Normalized user shape returned by the identity provider port.

IdentityProvider.description: Port interface abstracting authentication provider operations.
